headline: Jefferies Sees Compelling Entry Point in C.H. Robinson (CHRW) Shares
summary: C.H. Robinson Worldwide, Inc. (NASDAQ:CHRW) is included among the 10 Safe Stocks to Buy for the Long Term in 2026. On May 20, Jefferies upgraded C.H. Robinson Worldwide, Inc. (NASDAQ:CHRW) to Buy from Hold. It also lifted the price target to $200 from $195. Analyst Stephanie Moore said a visit to the company’s headquarters “materially […]
